expectations.text: Profile exists with valid JSON and composition
expectations.evidence: profile.json has id, role_type_id, composition with agent_core_id, argumentation_pattern_id, prompt_modifier_id
Bundle role is 'UX Researcher', role_type_id should be "ux-researcher" (existing convention: each bundle has unique role_type_id). Got "analyst" — incorrectly derived from agent_core_id.
